digest.greeting: Jean, today's dashboard state shows the June 10 checklist largely closed out, including DP/Staff Aug coverage, CoE owner work, Court EAD, DocuSign guidance, and the dashboard-access verification. Outlook also shows you routed two new CoE intake items to Mar and closed the Phase 2 SMS support loop by handing Legal/Marketing SME outreach to the CoE team. One fresh access request remains visible for follow-up.

items.label: Resolved DP Guidance and Staff Aug coverage
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-resolve-dp-trace-staff-aug-coverage complete after the morning overlap between DP Guidance and the TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint.

items.label: Reviewed the Detention Prevention pilot package
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-review-detention-prevention-pilot-package complete after the ELT green-light follow-up appeared in today's base digest.

items.label: Landed CoE owners and next steps
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-land-coe-owners-next-steps complete after today's CoE touchpoint stack.

items.label: Reviewed Court EAD final deliverables
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-review-court-ead-deliverables complete, covering the dashboard and report deliverables that were ready for use.

items.label: Monitored DocuSign taskset guidance
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-monitor-docusign-taskset-guidance complete after the Teams-derived DocuSign process guidance in the base digest.

items.label: Followed up on EPMO Liderazgo commitments
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-follow-up-epmo-liderazgo-commitments complete after the morning digest flagged the two loose Teams commitments.

items.label: Verified dashboard access signals
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-verify-github-token-dashboard-access complete. Outlook also showed same-day GitHub and Vercel access/security notices tied to the dashboard work.

items.label: Decided the Discovery recording restore path
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260610-decide-discovery-recording-restore complete after the SharePoint recording-expiration notice from this morning.

items.label: Completed Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-complete-nadias-affected-areas-request complete after it carried into today's checklist.

items.label: Reviewed Rippling and Asana overdue tasks
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-review-rippling-and-asana-overdue-tasks complete after the carried-over overdue-task review.

items.label: Closed the Project Coordinator decision loop
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-close-project-coordinator-decision-loop complete after the recruiting decision follow-up carried into today.

items.label: Reviewed Staff Aug PRD and queue impacts
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-review-staff-aug-prd-and-queue-impacts complete, tied to today's TRACE & Staff Aug context.

items.label: Monitored DACA/I-90 remaining IT work
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-monitor-daca-i90-remaining-it-work complete after the carried-over IT/UAT monitoring item.

items.label: Resolved Phase 2 ownership and tool-support follow-ups
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-resolve-phase-2-ownership-and-tool-support-follow-ups complete. Outlook shows Jorge identified Raquel Trujillo for Legal support, and Jean replied that the CoE team will handle Marketing and Legal SME outreach from here.

items.label: Decided the expired Staff Aug recording path
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260609-decide-expired-staff-aug-recording complete after the carried-over recording decision item.

items.label: Routed two new CoE intake items to Mar
items.detail: Outlook shows Jean sent Mar two same-day CM-CoE intake notices for RNWLS - Missing EAD Inquiry and SUPP - Post-submission Case Change.

items.label: Review Juanita's I-693 FAQ access request
items.detail: Outlook shows an unread SharePoint access request from Juanita Arrieta Salguero for the I-693 FAQ for Client Facing Teams document at 4:53 PM AST. Decide whether to approve or decline access.

items.label: Phase 2 SMS SME outreach moved to the CoE team
items.detail: In today's Outlook thread, Jorge confirmed Raquel Trujillo can support from Legal. Jean then replied that the CoE team will handle the Marketing and Legal SME outreach from now on.

items.label: 1:1 Andrea and Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1. Useful for Staff Aug PRD, Send Letters, and Andrea-owned project threads.

items.label: 1:1 Santiago & Jean
items.detail: Outlook shows Santiago accepted this meeting today. Use it to catch up after his OOO on Staff Aug, Incident Response, and DACA/I-90 status if still relevant.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: New weekly series with Sara. Good place for escalations, priority clarity, and unresolved ownership questions.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Ninety-minute protected block before BCP/Incident Response and the afternoon 1:1 stack.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Outlook shows Tessa declined, with Larry, Lucia, Dan, Sarah, Santiago, Angelica, and others on the invite. Use for Incident Response ownership follow-up if needed.

items.label: 1:1 Camilo & Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 with Camilo. Outlook also shows Rippling confirmed Camilo's June 26 voting leave for awareness only.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda includes portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps.

items.label: Focus time
items.detail: Outlook shows a one-hour focus block after the 1:1 stack and before Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team forum for project progress, roadblocks, shared learning, and any follow-through from today's CoE or Phase 2 routing decisions.
